name: VELLUM Engine
author: VELLUM
description: VELLUM II (Palimpsest) — a living-narrative engine for Lumiverse. An append-only event-log chronicle (arcs, threads, cast, evolving relations, dramatic-irony knowledge & secrets, hierarchical memory), hybrid scene-aware recall (lexical + host embeddings + structured), a relationship graph, and an in-app Vault (world books) — driven by a token-lean, fully block-controllable preset.
